en.name: Past
en.description: The past position represents events, influences, or situations that have already occurred and may still be affecting the present. It can provide insight into how past experiences shape current circumstances.

en.name: Present
en.description: The present position represents the current situation, influences, or circumstances. It provides insight into what is happening now and how it may be affecting the querent.

en.name: Future
en.description: The future position represents potential outcomes, influences, or situations that may arise. It offers guidance on what to expect and how to prepare for upcoming events.

en.name: Celtic Cross
en.description: A comprehensive spread that provides insight into various aspects of a situation, including the present, challenges, past influences, future possibilities, and external factors.

en.name: Present
en.description: The current situation or issue being addressed in the reading.

en.name: Challenge
en.description: The obstacle or challenge that the querent is currently facing.

en.name: Past
en.description: Events or influences from the past that are relevant to the current situation.

en.name: Future
en.description: Potential outcomes or developments that may arise from the current situation.

en.name: External Influences
en.description: Factors outside of the querent's control that may be affecting the situation.
